text.title: IaC Testing Patterns Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the config artefact this methodology produces. Validator enforces required keys plus per-field constraints.

example.note: Required fields missing or shape violated; see VIOLATION output from the validator.

antipattern.reason: Manual review alone misses subtle violations.

antipattern.description: Component layer with only exit-0 assertion.
antipattern.reason: Exit 0 plans still wrong; attribute assertions required.
